B2B Campaign - Gamma Prompt

Gamma.app prompt for generating the HeyZack B2B property management campaign deck

Gamma.app Prompt: HeyZack B2B Campaign Deck

Presentation Brief

Create a 15-slide sales deck for HeyZack targeting commercial property managers and facilities directors. Focus on ROI, use cases, and solving real property management challenges.

Audience: Property managers, facilities directors, building owners Tone: Consultative, empathetic, ROI-focused Style: Professional, clean, data-driven

Theme & Styling

Color Palette:

  • Primary: #243984 (blue)
  • Accent: #E82F89 (pink) — use for savings/ROI numbers
  • Background: #FFFFFF and #F8FAFC
  • Text: #2E2D2C

Typography:

  • Headlines: Bold sans-serif
  • Body: Clean, readable
  • Numbers: Extra bold for ROI/savings

Slide Content

Slide 1: Title

HeyZack for Property Management AI-Powered Building Automation That Delivers ROI

Modern building visual with gradient overlay

Slide 2: Pain Points

We Know Your Pain Points

  • $200 vendor service calls
  • 7+ apps to manage
  • No energy visibility
  • 10 PM tenant complaints
  • Budget pressure from ownership

Slide 3: Persona

Sound Familiar? Meet Patricia

Patricia manages 30 buildings:

  • 47 temperature complaints/month
  • $4,200 in emergency visits
  • 15% over budget
  • “I spend more time putting out fires…”

Slide 4: Possibility

What If You Could…

  • Adjust any thermostat remotely
  • See every energy dollar
  • Get alerts before complaints
  • Automate check-ins
  • Prove ROI with real data

Slide 5: Solution

95% Lower Cost Than Traditional BMS

  • $5K per building (vs. $85K)
  • One dashboard, unlimited properties
  • 20-30% energy savings
  • DIY installation

Slide 6: Dashboard

See Everything. Control Everything.

  • Portfolio Overview
  • Remote Control
  • Alert Management
  • Energy Analytics
  • Tenant Automation

Dashboard screenshot

Slide 7: AI

Real Intelligence, Not Just Schedules

AI learns:

  • Occupancy patterns
  • Seasonal changes
  • Anomaly detection

Savings: 10% → 20% → 30% over 6 months

Slide 8: Use Case 1

The 10 PM Complaint Call

Before: $350 emergency call After: 90 seconds, $0

$4,200/year saved

Slide 9: Use Case 2

Proactive Maintenance

Alert: HVAC cycling 40% more Action: $800 preventive Avoided: $12,000 emergency

$11,200 saved

Slide 10: Use Case 3

Automated Guest Experience

  • Auto door code at 2:30 PM
  • Pre-cool to 72°F
  • Welcome lighting
  • Eco mode at checkout

$6,400/year per property

Slide 11: Products

128 Products. One Vendor.

CategoryCount
Climate14
Security22
Energy12
Lighting18
Sensors13
Gateways4

Slide 12: ROI Calculator

See Your Savings

20 buildings × $2,000/mo × 25% = $120,000/year

Payback: 4-8 months

Slide 13: Timeline

From Purchase to ROI: 30 Days

  • Week 1: Assessment
  • Week 2: Installation
  • Week 3: Configuration
  • Week 4: Go-live

(Traditional BMS: 6-12 months)

Slide 14: Summary

The Bottom Line

✓ One dashboard | ✗ 7+ apps ✓ 20-30% savings | ✗ Rising costs ✓ Proactive alerts | ✗ Emergencies ✓ DIY install | ✗ $85K vendors

30-day money-back guarantee

Slide 15: CTA

Ready to Transform Your Portfolio?

  • Free Assessment Call
  • Pilot Program (3 buildings)
  • Live Demo

property@heyzack.ai

Gradient background

Generation Settings

  • Layout: Modern, asymmetric grids
  • Images: AI-generated tech/building imagery
  • Charts: Clean, minimal, brand colors
  • Animations: Subtle fade-ins, professional
